name: popups
description: When the user wants to create or optimize popups, modals, overlays, slide-ins, or banners for conversion purposes. Also use when the user mentions "exit intent," "popup conversions," "modal optimization," "lead capture popup," "email popup," "announcement banner," "overlay," "collect emails with a popup," "exit popup," "scroll trigger," "sticky bar," or "notification bar." summary_zh: 专用于制作和优化网页弹窗、悬浮窗及公告栏，帮你拦截流失用户、收集线索并提升转化率，适合任何需要用弹窗引导留资或促转化的场景。
